classObjective: Find the length of a segment by reading coordinates from a number line.
workedExamples: 10-3, Example 1 — Find Segment Lengths from Number Lines
10-3, Example 2 — Find Segment Lengths from Coordinates on a Number Line
warmUp: Find the length of the segment from point 2 to point 9 on a number line
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: absolute value distance on a number line; segment length from coordinates
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice finding segment lengths from number lines and coordinates
independentPractice: Practice problems calculating segment lengths using absolute value distance
assessment: Exit ticket: find the length of the segment with endpoints at -3 and 7 on a number line
capReflection: Why does absolute value give us the distance between two points on a number line?
